explanation: The provided code implements a recursive algorithm to generate and print all possible permutations of the numbers from 1 to 5. It uses a boolean array to track which digits have been included in the current permutation, and an integer array to store the current permutation being built. The function 'foo' is called recursively, adding unused digits to the permutation until a complete permutation of length N is formed, at which point it is printed out.
subject: Session 3 Exercise 1
summary: This project generates all permutations of the digits from 1 to N, where N is defined as 5.
